name: proc_creation_win_susp_bad_opsec_sacrificial_processes
raw_query: any where ((process.executable:"*\\WerFault.exe" and process.command_line:"*WerFault.exe") or (process.executable:"*\\rundll32.exe" and process.command_line:"*rundll32.exe") or (process.executable:"*\\regsvcs.exe" and process.command_line:"*regsvcs.exe") or (process.executable:"*\\regasm.exe" and process.command_line:"*regasm.exe") or (process.executable:"*\\regsvr32.exe" and process.command_line:"*regsvr32.exe")) and (not ((process.parent.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\EdgeUpdate\\Install\\{*" and process.executable:"*\\rundll32.exe" and process.command_line:"*rundll32.exe") or ((process.parent.executable like~ ("*\\AppData\\Local\\BraveSoftware\\Brave-Browser\\Application\\*", "*\\AppData\\Local\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\*")) and process.parent.executable:"*\\Installer\\setup.exe" and process.parent.command_line:"*--uninstall *" and process.executable:"*\\rundll32.exe" and process.command_line:"*rundll32.exe")))
